allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', p.get\('version'\)\); print\('jest keys:', [k for k in p.get\('exports', {}\).keys\(\) if 'jest' in k.lower\(\)]\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./frontend/node_modules/next/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); const jestKeys = Object.keys\(p.exports || {}\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('jest'\)\); console.log\('jest keys:', jestKeys\)")
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/docs" -TimeoutSec 3; "Backend up: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Backend not running: $_" })
